metadata.description: Claude Code tooling for iOS / Swift developers

plugins.name: ios-dev
plugins.description: iOS / Swift developer commands — currently a multi-agent code review (/ios-dev:review) of a PR or local branch diff, with optional swiftui-pro / swift-testing-pro / swift-concurrency-pro deep dives

plugins.name: swiftui-pro
plugins.description: Deep SwiftUI review skill — companion to /review (by Paul Hudson, MIT)

plugins.name: swift-testing-pro
plugins.description: Deep Swift Testing review skill — companion to /review (by Paul Hudson, MIT)

plugins.name: swift-concurrency-pro
plugins.description: Deep Swift concurrency review skill — companion to /review (by Paul Hudson, MIT)
